rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into component implementations when bindings depend on subcomponent ports or implementation-level state.
Place component type annexes only for contracts using visible features and concrete, named bounds.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL scope boundaries: type annexes for visible interfaces, implementation annexes for internal bindings.
Ensure AGREE variable references match declared AADL port types and visibility context.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use int, real, bool as AGREE scalar types—never integer or boolean.
Boolean port comparisons must derive from AGREE bool declarations, not numeric conversions.
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type annexes.
Avoid numeric range logic on Boolean or opaque ports without explicit scalar typing.
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
